title: chargeback — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for resolving chargebacks, computing rate, computing RDR eligibility, reading approaching-deadline chargebacks. All helpers are thin wrappers around bound services — never business logic.

helpers.purpose: Cache-aware lookup for a chargeback within a tenant. Returns the Chargeback model or null when unknown / soft-deleted.

Returns the rolling chargeback rate for a tenant + network over the specified window in days (default 60 — matches VDMP/MDMP windows). Returns 0.0 when no transactions exist. Cached via cbk:rate:{tenant_id}:{network} (24h TTL — invalidated by nightly MonitorChargebackRateJob run).
Returns the VDMP/MDMP threshold percent for a network (0.009 Visa / 0.015 Mastercard / 0.01 Amex / 0.01 Discover). Reads from config chargeback.rate_monitoring.threshold_<network>_percent.

Read-only computation of RDR eligibility for an existing chargeback. Returns true when: network='visa' AND amount_cents <= chargeback.rdr.auto_refund_threshold_cents AND tenant holds chargeback_rdr entitlement AND parent payment.amount_refunded_cents == 0. Used by SDUI to conditionally show the accept-via-RDR button.

Read-only computation of CE3.0 eligibility. Returns true when: network='visa' AND reason_category='fraud' AND tenant holds chargeback_ce3 entitlement AND customer has >= 2 prior successful payments in last 120 days.
Generate the next sequential chargeback number for a tenant + year. Uses the cbk:sequence:{tenant_id}:{year} counter. Returns a formatted string like 'CBK-2026-00000042'.

helpers.signature: reason_code_metadata(string $network, string $reasonCode): array{category: string, description: string, dispute_time_limit_days: int}
helpers.purpose: Look up metadata for a specific reason code within a network. Returns the reason_category + human-readable description + network's dispute time limit (typical evidence deadline). Reads data/reason-code-catalog.json.
Returns days remaining until evidence_due_by. Negative when past deadline. Used by SDUI to render approaching-deadline badges.

Given the cached auto-collected evidence draft (cbk:evidence-draft:{chargeback_id}) OR the latest submitted evidence row, returns 0-100 percent — how many of the 8 evidence fields (invoice_evidence / receipt_evidence / service_documentation / refund_policy / communication_log / shipping_docs / customer_signature_evidence / uncategorized_text) are populated. Used by SDUI + evidence-overdue notifications for signal.
Returns the list of user_ids holding chargebacks.submit-evidence permission for a tenant. Cached via cbk:defenders:{tenant_id} (10min TTL).
Returns the configured network chargeback fee in cents for a network. Reads config chargeback.fees.default_by_network.<network>. Used by NetworkFeeCalculator + display in SDUI.

Returns the configured polling interval in seconds for a specific provider (from config chargeback.providers.<provider>.polling_interval_seconds). Returns null when polling is disabled (e.g. custom_webhook default). Used by scheduler to dispatch CheckChargebackStatusJob at the right cadence.

notes: Helpers deliberately delegate — testing swaps the bound service to a stub, and every helper follows.
No helper directly touches the DB — everything routes through repositories or services.

chargeback_rate() is intentionally a `read` — the write path is MonitorChargebackRateJob nightly. Ad-hoc reads use the cached value; if the cache is stale, the caller must dispatch MonitorChargebackRateJob directly.
is_rdr_eligible() + is_ce3_eligible() are pure reads — they do NOT freeze the eligibility flags on the chargeback row. Freezing happens at chargeback creation via ChargebackObserver.creating.
